system.description:
### Tier 2 Support A tech specialist capable of stripping shields and deploying combat drones to harass enemies. Motives & Tactics: Control the battlefield with drones and high-damage tech abilities from a safe distance.

#### Features Deploy Combat Drone - Action: Spend 1 Fear. The Engineer deploys a Drone (Difficulty 12, 1 HP, Dmg 4 ene). The Drone immediately gain the Spotlight.

Overload - Action: The Engineer targets a PC's tech or armor. The target must make an agility Reaction Roll. On a failure, they must mark one Shield Slot and mark 1 Stress.

Incinerate - Action: The Engineer launches a high-heat projectile. Target takes 2d6 ene damage and is Burning (takes 3 ene damage whenever they have the Spotlight until they spend an action to put it out).

}}

{{adversary,
